comment: Contract-frozen function signatures. A function goes here when a verifiable artifact (approved plan / acceptance corpus / mutation corpus) calls it positionally, so its signature may not change without resyncing that artifact in the same change. Each entry pins the exact accepts lines the map must carry; signature-guard.test.mjs compares them against docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd (which the ship gate proves equal to code). eslintDisable lists the rules the in-code eslint-disable comment names — the parity test cross-checks the comment exists and nothing beyond this registry does.

accepts: prev: { x: number; y: number; k: number }
